name: Garlic Butter Pasta
steps: Cook spaghetti in salted water according to package. Reserve 1 cup pasta water before draining.
Mince garlic. Melt butter with olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add garlic and red pepper flakes, cook 1-2 minutes until fragrant (don't burn).
Add drained pasta and 1/2 cup reserved pasta water. Toss to coat.
Add parmesan, squeeze of lemon juice, and parsley. Toss again, adding more pasta water if needed.
notes: Add grilled chicken or shrimp for protein. Works with any pasta shape.
